failed_jobs.name: Tests / Polyglot SDK Validation / Java SDK Validation
failed_jobs.reason: NuGet package restore failed because api.nuget.org returned invalid/corrupt data: index.json endpoints returned non-object JSON ('The JSON document is not an object') and nupkg downloads had 'Central Directory corrupt' errors. These are transient nuget.org infrastructure issues unrelated to the PR changes.

failed_jobs.name: Tests / Polyglot SDK Validation / Polyglot Validation Results
failed_jobs.reason: Cascading failure from Java SDK Validation job. The check-results step exited with code 1 because Java validation was reported as 'failure' (Python, Go, TypeScript all succeeded).
